acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] `join` can only be called on same‑lineage beads at compile time.
- [ ] Collision checks move to construction boundary, not inside `join`.
- [ ] All existing join call sites are updated; old API removed or deprecated.
description:
**Problem**
`Bead::join` has a documented precondition: the beads must share the same ID and `core.created` (lineage). This is enforced by runtime checks returning `CollisionError`, but the type system does not prevent misuse. It’s easy to call `join` in a context where collisions are possible, especially during refactors.

Key references:
- `crates/beads-core/src/bead.rs:149` — precondition comment + runtime collision error.

Severity: misuse produces runtime errors and undermines correctness of merge logic.
design:
**Design**
Encode same-lineage constraint in the type system.

Option A (newtype):
- Introduce `SameLineageBead<'a>` wrapper constructed only by a checked function:
  - `fn same_lineage(a: &Bead, b: &Bead) -> Result<(SameLineageBead, SameLineageBead), CoreError>`
- Implement `join` for `SameLineageBead` only.

Option B (keyed grouping):
- Introduce `LineageKey { id: BeadId, created: Stamp }` and require it to construct a pair for join.

Migration:
- Keep old `Bead::join` temporarily, mark deprecated, and move callers to typed join.
title: Make Bead::join require same‑lineage type

description:
**Problem**
`create`, `show`, and `update` still live in `crates/beads-rs/src/cli/commands`, even though adjacent read/write command handlers have moved to `beads-cli`. This keeps core CRUD ownership split and increases regression surface during future command work.

**Design**
Move the handler implementations and argument types for `create`, `show`, and `update` into `crates/beads-cli/src/commands/`. Keep `beads-rs` modules as thin compatibility shims that call through to `beads-cli`.

**Acceptance**
- [ ] `crates/beads-cli/src/commands/{create,show,update}.rs` exist and own handler logic.
- [ ] `crates/beads-rs/src/cli/commands/{create,show,update}.rs` are compatibility shims only.
- [ ] Existing output semantics (human + `--json`) are unchanged.
- [ ] Integration coverage exercises create/show/update critical paths.
- [ ] `cargo fmt --all`, `just dylint`, `cargo clippy --all-features -- -D warnings`, `cargo test`, and `cargo test --features slow-tests` pass.

**Files**
- crates/beads-cli/src/commands/create.rs
- crates/beads-cli/src/commands/show.rs
- crates/beads-cli/src/commands/update.rs
- crates/beads-rs/src/cli/commands/create.rs
- crates/beads-rs/src/cli/commands/show.rs
- crates/beads-rs/src/cli/commands/update.rs
title: Migrate create/show/update command handlers to beads-cli
